title: Realistic Road Ageing
description: Bring immersion and realism to your city with Road Age Addon, a mod that simulates real-world wear on roads over time!
body:
📝 Description:
Bring immersion and realism to your city with Road Age Addon, a mod that simulates real-world wear on roads over time!

🛣️ Features:

Automatically ages road blocks from Fureniku’s Roads mod

Configurable IRL time-based interval (default: every 60 minutes)

Aging only occurs near players to optimize performance

Includes /roadage reload command to reapply config without restarting

 
    Includes /roadage now command to age roads instently

GUI-based config (Forge Mod Options)

🔧 Setup:

Requires Fureniku’s Roads

Supports both automatic aging and optional manual triggers via code or commands

💡 Great for survival servers, city builders, or roleplay worlds where roads don’t stay perfect forever. https://discord.gg/q3ycRjBG9q
